name: Chongqing House
review_summary: Authentic Sichuan flavors with generous portions. The mapo tofu and spicy boiled fish are standouts.

name: Chengdu Taste
review_summary: Classic Chengdu-style dishes done right. Dan dan noodles and twice-cooked pork are fan favorites.

name: Rong Chic
review_summary: A no-frills spot beloved by Chinese students for its affordable home-style dishes and hearty noodle soups.

name: Jahunger
review_summary: Providence's only Uyghur restaurant. The lamb skewers, big plate chicken, and hand-pulled noodles are unlike anything else in the city.

name: Chef Yao
review_summary: Dependable Cantonese classics with a friendly atmosphere. Great for a full sit-down meal with roast meats and stir-fries.

name: Mala Noodle
review_summary: Excellent spicy noodle soups popular with the Brown and RISD crowd. The mala broth is addictive.

name: 12 Dumplings
review_summary: Handmade dumplings with a variety of fillings — pork and cabbage are the classic, but the shrimp and chive are excellent too.

name: Y Bento
review_summary: Quick, affordable Japanese-style bento boxes with generous rice and protein combinations. Great for a fast lunch.

name: Y Noodle Bar
review_summary: A casual noodle bar with broth-based soups and dry noodle options. Customizable spice levels and toppings.

name: Lamei Hotpot
review_summary: Providence's best hotpot experience with quality fresh ingredients and rich broth options. Come hungry and with friends.

name: Pho Horn
review_summary: Exceptional pho and Vietnamese staples just outside Providence. The bone broth is simmered for hours and it shows.

name: Champa
review_summary: Flavorful Southeast Asian dishes with a focus on Lao cuisine. The papaya salad and larb are fresh and vibrant.

name: Lobanton
review_summary: A neighborhood Chinese restaurant with solid Cantonese stir-fries and rice plates. Relaxed vibe and reliable quality.

name: Wong's Kitchen
review_summary: Family-run Cantonese kitchen with a loyal local following. Roast duck and dim sum items are a must-order.
